mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (id, user_id, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, remark, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, paid_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'paid' THEN NOW() ELSE paid_time END, shipped_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'shipped' THEN NOW() ELSE shipped_time END, completed_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'completed' THEN NOW() ELSE completed_time END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, paid_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'paid' THEN NOW() ELSE paid_time END, shipped_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'shipped' THEN NOW() ELSE shipped_time END, completed_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'completed' THEN NOW() ELSE completed_time END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus}
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.status, o.receiver_name AS receiverName, o.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, o.receiver_address AS receiverAddress, o.remark, o.tracking_no AS trackingNo, o.paid_time AS paidTime, o.shipped_time AS shippedTime, o.completed_time AS completedTime, o.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT p.user_id FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.order_id = o.id LIMIT 1) AS sellerId FROM orders o WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, total_amount AS totalAmount, status, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, receiver_address AS receiverAddress, remark, tracking_no AS trackingNo, paid_time AS paidTime, shipped_time AS shippedTime, completed_time AS completedTime, created_at AS createdAt FROM orders WHERE tracking_no = #{trackingNo}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, total_amount AS totalAmount, status, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, receiver_address AS receiverAddress, remark, tracking_no AS trackingNo, paid_time AS paidTime, shipped_time AS shippedTime, completed_time AS completedTime, created_at AS createdAt FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.status, o.receiver_name AS receiverName, o.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, o.receiver_address AS receiverAddress, o.remark, o.tracking_no AS trackingNo, o.paid_time AS paidTime, o.shipped_time AS shippedTime, o.completed_time AS completedTime, o.created_at AS createdAt FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE p.user_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = 'shipped', tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, shipped_time = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 'paid'
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.status AS orderStatus, o.created_at AS createdAt, u_buyer.nickname AS buyerName, u_buyer.email AS buyerEmail, u_seller.enterprise_name AS sellerName, oi.product_id AS productId, oi.product_name AS productName, oi.product_image AS productImage, oi.quantity, oi.price, oi.subtotal FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN users u_buyer ON o.user_id = u_buyer.id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id INNER JOIN users u_seller ON p.user_id = u_seller.id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, total_amount AS totalAmount, status, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, receiver_address AS receiverAddress, remark, tracking_no AS trackingNo, paid_time AS paidTime, shipped_time AS shippedTime, completed_time AS completedTime, created_at AS createdAt FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending' AND created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, total_amount AS totalAmount, status, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, receiver_address AS receiverAddress, remark, tracking_no AS trackingNo, paid_time AS paidTime, shipped_time AS shippedTime, completed_time AS completedTime, created_at AS createdAt FROM orders WHERE status = 'shipped' AND shipped_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY shipped_time ASC
SELECT p.user_id FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
